curated.label: Curated — Proven community skills
curated.description: Battle-tested skills with real adoption. Handpicked for quality and clear intent.

rising.label: Up & Coming — New skills worth watching
rising.description: Recently published skills showing strong potential. Included early because they fill gaps nothing else covers.

skills.name: Debug Pro
skills.description: 7-step debugging protocol with language-specific commands to systematically identify, verify, and fix software bugs across multiple environments.
skills.author: @cmanfire7

skills.name: Git Essentials
skills.description: Essential Git commands and workflows for version control, branching, and collaboration.
skills.author: @Arnarsson

skills.name: Security Auditor
skills.description: Review code for security vulnerabilities — OWASP Top 10, CORS/CSP headers, secrets handling, input validation, SQL injection, and auth flows.
skills.author: @jgarrison929

skills.name: Test Runner
skills.description: Write, run, and manage unit, integration, and E2E tests across TypeScript, Python, and Swift using recommended frameworks.
skills.author: @cmanfire7

skills.name: Code Review
skills.description: Systematic code review patterns covering security, performance, maintainability, correctness, and testing — with severity levels and structured feedback.
skills.author: @wpank

skills.name: Git Workflows
skills.description: Advanced git operations — rebasing, bisecting bugs, worktrees, recovering with reflog, managing subtrees/submodules, resolving merge conflicts.
skills.author: @gitgoodordietrying

skills.name: Conventional Commits
skills.description: Format commit messages using the Conventional Commits specification. Suggests types (feat, fix, docs, chore, refactor, perf, test, ci) and enforces proper structure.
skills.author: @bastos

skills.name: Security Audit Toolkit
skills.description: Audit codebases and infrastructure for security issues — scanning dependencies, detecting hardcoded secrets, checking OWASP top 10, verifying SSL/TLS.
skills.author: @gitgoodordietrying

skills.name: Docker
skills.description: Docker containers, images, Compose stacks, networking, volumes, debugging, production hardening, and the commands that keep environments stable.
skills.author: @ivangdavila

skills.name: API Development
skills.description: Scaffold, test, document, and debug REST and GraphQL APIs. Generate OpenAPI specs, mock APIs, and troubleshoot endpoints.
skills.author: @gitgoodordietrying

skills.name: PR Reviewer
skills.description: Automated GitHub PR code review with diff analysis, lint integration, and structured reports. Checks for security issues and code quality.
skills.author: @briancolinger

skills.name: CI/CD Pipeline
skills.description: Create, debug, and manage CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions. Covers workflow syntax, matrix builds, secrets management, caching, and deployment patterns.
skills.author: @gitgoodordietrying

skills.name: Codebase Documenter
skills.description: Write documentation for codebases — README files, architecture documentation, code comments, and API documentation.
skills.author: @Veeramanikandan

skills.name: Performance Profiler
skills.description: Profile and optimize application performance — CPU/memory usage, flame graphs, benchmarking functions, load testing APIs, finding memory leaks.
skills.author: @gitgoodordietrying

skills.name: ReviewEvo
skills.description: Self-improving code reviewer that learns your codebase over time. Analyzes git history, spots churn hotspots, identifies risk, and builds a persistent knowledge base that sharpens every review.
skills.author: @8co
intents: review my code and learn my patterns
review that gets smarter over time

skills.name: OpenTangl
skills.description: Autonomous development engine. You write the vision, it ships the code — plans features, writes code, creates PRs, reviews, and merges across multiple repos.
skills.author: @8co
intents: I want AI to write code and create PRs
